# Phase 3 Session 12 — Catalog Audit

**Generated:** 2026-04-14
**Source of truth:** [scripts/extraction_output.json](../scripts/extraction_output.json), regenerated by `node scripts/extract_answer_keys.mjs`.

## Source trees

- `/Users/kiranshay/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Personal/Desktop/Affordable Tutoring Solutions Inc/Official Worksheets & Resources`
- `/Users/kiranshay/Downloads/ats_psms`
- `/Users/kiranshay/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Personal/Desktop/Affordable Tutoring Solutions Inc/Client Profiles`

Both trees are indexed together. The live OneDrive mount uses catalog-style abbreviated filenames and is authoritative for most worksheets; the `ats_psms` bulk download uses expanded filenames and contributes worksheets (mostly STU PDFs) the live mount is missing.

## Mixed answerFormat — needs triage (56)

Worksheets whose extracted answers include at least one string that is neither a clean A-D letter nor a clean numeric/fraction. Possible causes: legitimately mixed MC + grid-in, numeric answers with trailing units, alternative answer formats (`A or 1`), decimal answers, ranges. The **Offending answers** column shows every answer that failed the clean-format check — use it to decide whether to tighten the FR regex for a second pass or accept these as genuinely mixed.

| idx | Title | qs | Offending answers |
|---:|---|---:|---|

## Q-count mismatch (0)

Catalog `qs` disagrees with the number of `Question ID` headers extracted from the PDF. Either the catalog is stale, the PDF has a non-standard layout, or spurious header matches were picked up. Each row shows all extracted tuples so you can eyeball which side is wrong.

## Unknown — no tuples extracted (0)

The KEY PDF was parseable by `pdftotext` but zero `Question ID` headers were found. Likely the PDF uses a different document shape (older College Board releases, hand-written keys, image-only scans). **Punt.**

| idx | Title | keyFile |
|---:|---|---|

## Missing KEY PDF (0)

Catalog entries whose expected `KEY_${keyTitle}.pdf` was not found in either source tree. **Triage categories:**

- **Fixable by catalog edit** — the file exists under a slightly different name (abbreviation mismatch, spacing, punctuation). Fix `keyTitle` in the catalog.
- **Fixable by file rename** — the catalog is canonical and the file needs renaming on OneDrive.
- **Punt** — Full Length Practice Exams, old CB releases, Literary/Poetry subfolders use different document shapes. Punt to post-Session-15 triage.

| idx | Title | Expected keyFile |
|---:|---|---|

## Missing STU PDF (0)

Catalog entries whose expected `STU_${title}.pdf` was not found on disk. `migrate_stu_pdfs.mjs` cannot upload these to Firebase Storage, so their `stu` field stays pointing at the OneDrive `1drv.ms` share link for now.

| idx | Title | Expected stuFile |
|---:|---|---|

## Unsupported (19)

Catalog rows that were explicitly marked `answerFormat: "unsupported"` by `scripts/apply_catalog_fixes.mjs`. The extractor skips these. They stay in the catalog so future sessions can upgrade them in place if a supported variant becomes available. Buckets:

- **Stub rows** — title/keyTitle are literal placeholders (`STU`/`KEY`/`N/A`). Never had real data.
- **Full Length exam writing sections** — PT1/2/4/5/6/7/8 + April 2019. Section-level answer sheets without per-question `Question ID` headers.
- **Literary / poetry prompts** — prose writing prompts (Poetry Practice #1-#4, Independent and Dependent Clauses). No objectively gradable answer key.

| idx | Title | Reason |
|---:|---|---|
| 52 | STU | stub row (title=STU, keyTitle=KEY) |
| 53 | April 2019 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 54 | PT1 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 55 | PT2 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 56 | PT4 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 57 | PT5 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 58 | PT6 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 59 | PT7 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 60 | PT8 Writing PDF | Full Length exam — section-level answer sheet, not per-question |
| 61 | STU | stub row (title=STU, keyTitle=KEY) |
| 62 | Independent and Dependent Clauses | literary worksheet — prose prompt, no per-question answer key |
| 63 | STU | stub row (title=STU, keyTitle=KEY) |
| 64 | SAT Poetry Practice #1 | poetry prompt — no per-question answer key |
| 65 | SAT Poetry Practice #2 | poetry prompt — no per-question answer key |
| 66 | SAT Poetry Practice #3 | poetry prompt — no per-question answer key |
| 67 | SAT Poetry Practice #4 | poetry prompt — no per-question answer key |
| 68 | CompAlgebra - Easy (15Qs) | uses old `Question #N` hand-numbering format — no per-question CB metadata to extract |
| 127 | Probability - Hard (3Qs) | KEY PDF has `Question ID` headers but zero `Correct Answer:` lines (template bug) |
| 144 | N.A | stub row (title=N.A, keyTitle=N/A) |

---

**Next step:** When the clean-extraction set is acceptable, `extract_answer_keys.mjs --commit` writes `questionKeys/{id}` to Firestore for the clean + true-mixed rows and rewrites `worksheets_catalog.json` with `questionIds[]` + `answerFormat` per row.
